problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
mechanism: Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference
hypothesis: If Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Comparative ablation study with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
